summary: The diff shows that the HomePage.tsx hero section heading was changed from 'Memory Increase' to 'NeuroBoost'. The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms this change. However, REQ-1 requires checking ALL frontend source files including layout components, game cards, headings, labels, button text, and any other visible UI text. Only one file (HomePage.tsx) shows explicit content changes, while other files (Layout.tsx, GameCard.tsx, translations.ts, etc.) are not shown as modified, leaving uncertainty about whether all occurrences were replaced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Find and replace all occurrences of 'Memory Increase' (and case variants) across ALL frontend source files including layout components, game cards, headings, labels, button text, and any other visible UI text.
missing_requirements.reason: Only HomePage.tsx is shown as modified with the replacement. Files like frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts, frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx, frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx, and other page components are not shown as modified, but they could contain 'Memory Increase' text. The diff does not demonstrate a comprehensive search-and-replace across all frontend source files as required.
